assertions.assertion: Warns against using in-memory stores in production
assertions.rationale: States in-memory stores shouldn't be used in production.

assertions.assertion: The store class has a FindByEntityIdAsync method that accepts a string entityId and CancellationToken
assertions.rationale: FindByEntityIdAsync only takes string entityId — no CancellationToken parameter.
Uses generic AddScoped<> DI registration instead of AddSamlServiceProviderStore<T>().

assertions.assertion: Uses EF Core (DbContext) for data access
